allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\benja\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\Portal_Proveedores_CMP\\logo.png"\); $sig = \($bytes[0..7] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\("X2"\) }\) -join " "; Write-Output "Firma hex \(8 bytes\): $sig"; if \($bytes[0] -eq 0x89 -and $bytes[1] -eq 0x50 -and $bytes[2] -eq 0x4E -and $bytes[3] -eq 0x47\) { $w = [BitConverter]::ToInt32\(\($bytes[19..16]\), 0\); $h = [BitConverter]::ToInt32\(\($bytes[23..20]\), 0\); Write-Output "Formato: PNG válido"; Write-Output "Dimensiones: ${w} x ${h}"; Write-Output "Tamaño archivo: $\($bytes.Length\) bytes" } else { Write-Output "NO es PNG válido \(firma no coincide\)" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\benja\\OneDrive\\Escritorio\\Portal_Proveedores_CMP\\favicon.png"\); $sig = \($bytes[0..7] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\("X2"\) }\) -join " "; Write-Output "Firma hex \(8 bytes\): $sig"; if \($bytes[0] -eq 0x89 -and $bytes[1] -eq 0x50 -and $bytes[2] -eq 0x4E -and $bytes[3] -eq 0x47\) { $w = [BitConverter]::ToInt32\(\($bytes[19..16]\), 0\); $h = [BitConverter]::ToInt32\(\($bytes[23..20]\), 0\); $ratio = [Math]::Round\($w / $h, 2\); Write-Output "Formato: PNG válido"; Write-Output "Dimensiones: ${w} x ${h} \(ratio ${ratio}:1\)"; Write-Output "Tamaño: $\($bytes.Length\) bytes" } else { Write-Output "NO es PNG válido" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("index.html"\) | Select-Object -First 3; $hasBom = \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\); Write-Output "HasBOM: $hasBom"; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("index.html"\); $crlf = \($content -match "`r`n"\); Write-Output "HasCRLF: $crlf"; Write-Output \("FileSize: " + \(Get-Item index.html\).Length + " bytes"\))
